notes: Seed listing for Budapest Night demo — Gerbeaud Café.

document.name: Gerbeaud
document.shortDescription: Historic patisserie on Vörösmarty tér — cakes, coffee, and terrace views at the heart of Pest.
document.longDescription: Gerbeaud has been a Budapest institution since the 19th century. Stop for espresso, classic Hungarian pastries, and people-watching on Vörösmarty tér before exploring Váci utca and the Danube promenade.
